verbGlossary.ACKNOWLEDGED BY: {source} has formally confirmed receipt and awareness of {target} or revision
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source} is designated as {target} for executing the scheduled field work
verbGlossary.AUTHORED BY: {source} wrote or dictated the field note or log narrative as the on-site recorder
verbGlossary.AUTHORIZED BY: {source} granted formal approval for the time-and-material work to proceed
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED BY: {source} provides the sustainability or compliance standard against which the metric is evaluated
verbGlossary.BILLED BY: {source} submits labor charges on the T&M ticket for work performed
verbGlossary.CAUSED BY: {source}'s work, decision, or condition is identified as the source of the logged delay
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED THROUGH: Employee holds safety or trade credentials validated through the regulatory {target}
verbGlossary.CHARGED BY: {source} bills equipment usage time and rates recorded on the T&M entry
verbGlossary.CITED AGAINST: {source} is formally written against {target}'s crew or work area
verbGlossary.CLOCKED BY: {source}'s workers recorded time entries against the project timecard system
verbGlossary.COMPILED BY: {source} assembles the daily report from multiple field log sections
verbGlossary.COORDINATED BY: {source} sequences and manages the scheduled work across multiple trades on site
verbGlossary.DISPATCHED BY: {source} directed the crew deployment to the jobsite
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED BY: {source} formally recorded the delay event with narrative, duration, and impact in the project log
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS WORK OF: {source} note describes activities, progress, or conditions related to {target}'s scope
verbGlossary.EMPLOYED BY: {source}record is held by {target} as the hiring entity
verbGlossary.FABRICATED BY: {source} manufactured or assembled the shipped materials off-site before delivery
verbGlossary.FILED BY: {source} completed and submitted the field report as the responsible site {target}
verbGlossary.FILED WITH: {source}is formally submitted to the regulatory {target} as a compliance obligation
verbGlossary.FULFILLED BY: {source} provides the requested workforce to satisfy the staffing need
verbGlossary.FURNISHED TO: {source} is delivered to the financial institution for draw or progress verification
verbGlossary.INITIATED BY: {source} created the T&M ticket to begin tracking extra work scope
verbGlossary.INSPECTED BY: {source} examined delivered materials at the receiving point for damage or spec conformance
verbGlossary.INVESTIGATED BY: {source} conducted the formal accident investigation and root-cause analysis
verbGlossary.INVOICED BY: {source} submits material charges documented on the T&M entry for payment
verbGlossary.ISSUED BY: {source} formally released the field document with {target} to affected parties
verbGlossary.LOGGED BY: {source} recorded the phone call or communication event in {target} system
verbGlossary.MANIFESTED BY: {source} prepared the waste manifest documenting dumpster contents and disposal routing
verbGlossary.MEASURED FOR: {source}tracks field performance or compliance attributable to this {target}
verbGlossary.MEASURES OUTPUT OF: {source} quantifies the installed work or production rate of {target}'s crew
verbGlossary.MOBILIZES: Assignment directs {target}'s crew or resources to a specific work area or task
verbGlossary.MONITORED BY: {source} performs ongoing environmental sampling or surveillance tied to the waste record
verbGlossary.NOTIFIED OF: {source} receives formal notice that a delay event has been logged against the project
verbGlossary.OPENED BY: {source} created {target} header record to begin that day's field documentation
verbGlossary.OPERATED BY: {source}'s personnel ran the equipment during the logged timecard period
verbGlossary.PERFORMED BY: {source}'s inspector executed the field inspection documented in {target}
verbGlossary.PLACED TO: {source}was directed to {target} as the receiving party
verbGlossary.RECEIVED BY: {source} accepted delivery of materials at the jobsite
verbGlossary.RECORDED BY: {source} entered the weather or field conditions into {target}
verbGlossary.REGISTERS VISIT BY: {source} entry documents {target}'s representative checking onto the jobsite
verbGlossary.REGULATED BY: Regulatory {target} holds jurisdiction over the waste handling and disposal documented in the log
verbGlossary.RENTED FROM: {source}ged on the entry was rented from {target} under a rental agreement
verbGlossary.REPORTABLE TO: {source} meets the threshold requiring formal notification to the regulatory {target}
verbGlossary.REPORTED TO: {source}are submitted to {target} for claims processing or coverage determination
verbGlossary.REPORTS HEADCOUNT FOR: {source} entry counts the number of workers on site belonging to {target}
verbGlossary.REQUESTED BY: {source} submitted the workforce request identifying staffing needs by trade and date
verbGlossary.REVIEWED BY: {source} examined and assessed {target} or field record for accuracy or completeness
verbGlossary.SAMPLED BY: Testing lab collected material samples from the delivery for quality verification
verbGlossary.SHIPPED BY: {source} transported the materials recorded in the delivery log to the jobsite
verbGlossary.SPOT-CHECKED BY: {source} performed random verification of installed quantities against the log entries
verbGlossary.STAFFED BY: {source} provides the workers who make up the crew membership roster
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED TO: {source} report is delivered to {target} as a contractual reporting obligation
verbGlossary.TALLIED BY: {source} aggregated the manpower counts across all trades for {target} summary
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} maintains the running log of equipment hours, location, and utilization on site
verbGlossary.VERIFIED BY: {source} con{target}ed the accuracy of quantities, counts, or conditions recorded in the field log
verbGlossary.WITNESSED BY: {source}'s representative was present during the inspection as an official observer
